welcome_offer.description: Earn $350 in OneKeyCash after you spend $3,000 on purchases in the first 3 months.
notes: Official Wells Fargo One Key+ page confirmed $350 OneKeyCash after $3,000/3 months on 2026-07-05.

earning_rates.notes: Earn in OneKeyCash on eligible Expedia Group brand purchases.

earning_rates.category: Gas stations, grocery stores, and dining
earning_rates.notes: Earn in OneKeyCash on eligible purchases.
Earn in OneKeyCash on all other purchases.

recurring_credits.name: OneKeyCash Anniversary Credit
recurring_credits.description: $100 in OneKeyCash each cardholder anniversary year. OneKeyCash redeems 1:1 USD on Expedia, Hotels.com, and Vrbo bookings. Unconditional anniversary bestowal.

recurring_credits.name: Trusted Traveler Credit (Global Entry/TSA PreCheck)
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit for Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee, once every four years.
